name: AppliedPackagingInfo
description:
Information describing the guest's packaging preferences for this order, for example utensils, napkins, condiments.

For more information, see [Packaging preferences](https://doc.toasttab.com/doc/devguide/apiOrdersPackagingPreferences.html)

ToastReference.description: A wrapper object with fields that allow reference to a Toast entity by Toast GUID.

guid.description: The GUID maintained by the Toast platform.

entityType.description: The type of object this is. Response only.

ToastReference.name: ToastReference

AppliedPackagingItem.description: Indicates the guest preference for an individual packaging item in this order.

itemConfigId.description: The identifier GUID of the packaging preference option.

inclusion.description: The packaging preference choice that the guest selected in your ordering interface.

itemTypes.description: The packaging item types relevant for this packaging item as configured by the restaurant in Toast Web. Response only.

guestDisplayName.description: The guest-facing name, configured by the restaurant in Toast Web, for this packaging item. Response only.

AppliedPackagingItem.name: AppliedPackagingItem
